rulings.Case Title: SBERLO FAMILY TRUST VS. TANYA PHILLIPS (3/19/12-AMENDED TO CONTRACT ACTION)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Disqualify Mark Hooshamnd And The Hooshmand Law Group From Acting As Attorney For Deft Tanya Phillips And Req. For Judicial Ntc
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 4, 2012 Line 1 - PLAINTIFF SBERLO FAMILY TRUST's Motion To Disqualify Mark Hooshamnd And The Hooshmand Law Group From Acting As Attorney For Deft Tanya Phillips. Hearing required. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RYAN STEELE, TRUSTEE FOR STEELE FAMILY REVOCABLE VS. ANELIA LUCIOW et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 4, 2012 Line 2 - DEFENDANT ANELIA LUCIOW's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, complaint sufficiently alleges at least one actionable violation i.e. notice (7)(b)&(c).=(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EVA SO PO CHOI REVOC. TRUST VS. RYAN MITCHELL-HALTER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 4, 2012 Line 3 - PLAINTIFF EVA CHOI's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny, failed to shift burden - no undisputed fact re possession. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHIRLEY LEE GEE VS. RENAE ANDERSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 4, 2012 Line 4 -DEFENDANT RENA ANDERSON's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Grant, names on summons and complaint do not match. =(501/REQ)
